title: Databricks Apps compute sizing support for compliance security profile standards
body:
[Compute sizing for Databricks Apps](/aws/en/dev-tools/databricks-apps/compute-size) now supports all compliance security profile standards supported by Databricks and is available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/enhanced-security-compliance) enabled.

For a full list of supported compliance standards, see [Compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile).
